title: Prediction Explainability & Model Audit Trail — Certification

auditChecklist.evidence: GET /api/predictions/explain/:symbol returns ExplanationOutput with summary, drivers, factor breakdowns, positives, negatives, and historical reliability for any symbol with two consecutive prediction_registry snapshots.

PredictionDiffEngine.IntelligenceSignal already includes explanation field. SignalValidationEngine attaches historicalSuccessRate, sampleSize, avgAlpha to every signal via /api/predictions/signals. AttentionCentre renders validation data inline.

PredictionExplanationEngine.fetchHistoricalReliability() queries SignalValidationEngine.validateClassificationChanges() and validateConfidenceChanges() to attach real outcome-based reliability data. WhyItChangedTab displays success rate, sample size, avg alpha, and predictive power for every prediction.

PredictionExplanationEngine.computeFactorContributions() breaks every score delta into individual factor contributions (quality, growth, value, momentum, risk, sector) with percentContribution and importanceRank. No aggregate score shown without factor-level breakdown.

GET /api/predictions/explain/:symbol registered in src/backend/web/routes/index.ts (predictionExplainRoutes). Backed by PredictionExplanationEngine which reads from prediction_registry via db pool. Returns structured JSON with classification, healthScore, drivers, factorContributions, and historicalReliability.

PredictionExplanationEngine.ts.purpose: Core engine that takes (todaySnapshot, previousSnapshot) and produces ExplanationOutput with summary, factor-level delta breakdowns, percent contribution analysis, and historical reliability.

WhyItChangedTab.tsx.purpose: UI component for the stock page 'Why It Changed' tab. Calls GET /api/predictions/explain/:symbol and renders health score delta, classification change, factor drivers ranked with percent contribution bars, factor contribution table, positives/negatives, and historical reliability panel.
WhyItChangedTab.tsx.wiredIn: StockStoryPage.tsx — added 'whychange' tab to TabKey union and tabs array, renders <WhyItChangedTab symbol={ticker} />

predictions/explain.ts.purpose: Fastify route for GET /api/predictions/explain/:symbol. Delegates to PredictionExplanationEngine.explain(). Returns 200 with ExplanationOutput JSON, 404 if no prediction found, 400 for invalid symbol.

dashboard priority ranking.implementation: PredictionExplanationEngine.computePriorityScore(impact, reliability, confidence) — static method, usable by AttentionCentre and TodaysChangesPanel for priority ordering.
dashboard priority ranking.formula: Priority Score = Impact (abs score delta) × Reliability (historical validation rate 0–1) × Confidence (confidence score 0–1)
dashboard priority ranking.usage: Call PredictionExplanationEngine.computePriorityScore(impact, reliabilityRate, confidenceRate) to rank signals

attention centre validation.existing: AttentionCentre.tsx already fetches /api/predictions/signals and renders validation data (historicalSuccessRate, sampleSize, avgAlpha) inline for critical and important items.
attention centre validation.enhanced: signals.ts imports PredictionExplanationEngine for future priorityScore-based ranking of the signal feed.

fileManifest: src/backend/web/routes/predictions/signals.ts (modified — imports PredictionExplanationEngine for future priority ranking)
successCondition: A user can click any prediction, score, upgrade, downgrade, alert, or attention item and understand exactly why it happened, what changed, and how reliable similar signals have been historically.
